title: How a QR Code Payments Standard Can Revolutionize The Way We Pay
excerpt: Real Time Payments Revolution is a podcast hosted by Sarah Hoisington, Matera VP of Strategy and Marketing, that delves into how instant payment technologies are transf
body:
Real Time Payments Revolution is a podcast hosted by Sarah Hoisington, Matera VP of Strategy and Marketing, that delves into how instant payment technologies are transforming the way we move money. Covering innovations like FedNow, RTP, QR codes, and NFC, the series explores how these tools are making payments faster, more secure, and always available.

The debut episode, titled "How a QR Code Payments Standard Can Revolutionize The Way We Pay," examines the potential of standardized QR codes to streamline payment experiences. By utilizing existing infrastructure and emphasizing user-friendly design, such standards aim to make transactions more seamless and beneficial for all parties involved.

Tune in to this episode to gain insights into the future of digital payments and the role of QR code standards in shaping that landscape.
